Name: Proxy: Nginx Reverse Proxy
Description: Nginx — high-performance HTTP server and reverse proxy. Use for websites, load balancing, and SSL termination.
Author: ogultra

Name: Proxy: HAProxy
Description: HAProxy — reliable, high-performance TCP/HTTP load balancer and proxy. Industry standard for high availability.
Author: ogultra

Name: Proxy: Caddy
Description: Caddy — modern web server with automatic HTTPS. Easiest to configure, handles SSL certs automatically.
Author: ogultra

Name: VPS: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
Description: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS container. Full Ubuntu environment for running any custom software. SSH via port 22.
Author: ogultra
Env: START=bash -c 'apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq openssh-server && echo root:{{RootPassword}} | chpasswd && sed -i "s/#PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config && mkdir -p /run/sshd && exec /usr/sbin/sshd -D'

Name: VPS: Debian 12
Description: Debian 12 Bookworm container. Minimal, stable Linux environment for advanced users.
Author: ogultra
Env: START=bash -c 'apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq openssh-server && echo root:{{RootPassword}} | chpasswd && sed -i "s/#PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config && mkdir -p /run/sshd && exec /usr/sbin/sshd -D'

Name: VPS: Alpine Linux
Description: Alpine Linux — minimal Docker-friendly distribution. Very small footprint (~5MB). Great for lightweight services.
Author: ogultra
Env: START=sh -c 'apk add --no-cache openssh && echo root:{{RootPassword}} | chpasswd && sed -i "s/#PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config && ssh-keygen -A && exec /usr/sbin/sshd -D'

Name: VPS: CentOS Stream 9
Description: CentOS Stream 9 container. RHEL-compatible Linux environment. Popular for enterprise-style deployments.
Author: ogultra
Env: START=bash -c 'dnf install -y openssh-server && echo root:{{RootPassword}} | chpasswd && sed -i "s/#PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config && ssh-keygen -A && exec /usr/sbin/sshd -D'
